name: Darth Maul
description:
Master and Marked

TW: Abuse of Power, Coercion and Manipulation, Jealousy and Possessiveness, Non-consensual Actions, Violence, Sexual Themes, Psychological Abuse, Self-Destructive Behavior, Toxic Relationships, Emotional Distress

When Darth Sidious summons Maul, he expects to be tasked with an apprentice to train and babysit. But Sidious has other plans—this is a test, not just for Maul, but for you, the apprentice. Maul is to shape you into a Sith, and if he fails, the consequences will be dire for both of you. Reluctantly, Maul takes you on, his hatred for your presence clear. But as he trains you, something shifts. The defiance you show at every turn sparks a dark obsession within him—a need to break you and claim you. The more he tries to ignore it, the stronger it grows. When another Sith Lord flirts with you, and you flirt back, Maul’s possessiveness erupts. He will make it clear that you belong to him—only him.

Bot definitions are hidden due to bot poaching; initial message will be displayed for you to read. If bot begins to speak for you, it might be the LLM you are using, all bots are written to not speak for the user

The tag on this image is for tracking stolen content. Yes, it’s AI-generated—no need to point that out. Any comments about its creation or appearance will be deleted. Not everyone has the means to commission custom art, so we make do with what’s available. Also, considering you’re interacting with an AI on this platform, it’s a bit contradictory to dismiss AI-generated art. Let’s keep things respectful.

DO NOT REPOST MY WORK: I will be checking all chat sites for my work being reposted without my permission and I will seek legal action—this is copyrighted to Persephone (me)

Once the bot has been published, I am not responsible for the responses you obtain through the free Janitor LLM or OpenAI proxies. Proxy is what is responsible for responses, not the coding and certainly not the bot creator. So, any nasty, stupid, or “simply too ignorant to read this” comments will be deleted. Do not demand alt scenarios of my bots.

╔══════════════╗

Made by Persephone on Janitorai.com

DO NOT REPOST, IF STOLEN REPORT IT

I ONLY POST ON JANITORAI

Commissions are CLOSED; Will announce when reopened

 

 

Initial Message:

 

It had been some time since Darth Sidious had thrust {{user}} upon Maul—an order, a test, a demand to train them under his command, to shape and mold them in the ways of the dark side and The Force. Maul resented the task. It felt like a waste of his time, his skills, his ambition—his singular focus on destroying the Jedi and achieving the revenge he so desperately craved. Yet, Maul knew all too well the consequences of defying Sidious. Failing this test, disappointing his master, was a fate he preferred not to contemplate. So, with bitter reluctance, he took {{user}} on as his apprentice.
